title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to Tenant to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Tenant name and Tenant ID are not cleared in Support > App section when switching from a tenant-linked account to a non-tenant account
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Log in with an account that is linked to Tenant A.
3. Navigate to: Account → Support → App section.
4. Verify that Tenant A information (Tenant name and Tenant ID) is displayed alongside the account information.
6. Log in with an account that is NOT linked to any Tenant.
7. Navigate to: Account → Support → App section.
8. Verify that the account information is displayed.
9. Verify that the Tenant name and Tenant ID fields are NOT present.
expected: After logging in with an account linked to Tenant A, the Support > App section displays both the account info and Tenant A's name and ID. After logging in with an account not linked to any Tenant, only the account info is shown; Tenant name and Tenant ID are absent.
